title.en: Rate the Spain and Argentina players in World Cup final
title.zh-CN: 在世界杯决赛中为西班牙和阿根廷球员评分

summary.en: Rate the Spain and Argentina players out of 10 below and come back 30 minutes after full-time to see the final ratings.
summary.zh-CN: 为西班牙和阿根廷球员打分（满分10分） ，并在全职结束后30分钟返回查看最终评分。

title.en: Robbie Williams, Tom Cruise and Jennifer Hudson among stars at World Cup closing ceremony
title.zh-CN: 罗比·威廉姆斯、汤姆·克鲁斯和詹妮弗·哈德森在世界杯闭幕式上与明星们一起

summary.en: The celebrity line-up will continue at half-time with performances by Madonna, Justin Bieber, Shakira and BTS.
summary.zh-CN: 名人阵容将在半场继续，由麦当娜、贾斯汀·比伯、夏奇拉和BTS演出。

title.en: Messi on the brink of history - will it be his last World Cup game?
title.zh-CN: 梅西处于历史的边缘--这将是他的最后一场世界杯比赛吗？

summary.en: Argentina captain Lionel Messi will play his 34th World Cup match in Sunday's final, but will it be his last appearance?
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷队长莱昂内尔·梅西将在周日的决赛中参加他的第34场世界杯比赛，但这将是他最后一次出场吗？

title.en: I've been a World Cup official - I promise you there is no favouritism
title.zh-CN: 我一直是世界杯官员-我向你保证，没有偏袒

summary.en: Darren Cann speaks to BBC Sport about the conspiracy theories around the World Cup and what referees really think.
summary.zh-CN: 达伦·坎恩（ Darren Cann ）向英国广播公司体育台（ BBC Sport ）讲述了围绕世界杯的阴谋论以及裁判的真实想法。

title.en: 'Legend' or 'regrets'? A final that will define Lamine Yamal's World Cup
title.zh-CN: “传奇”还是“遗憾” ？决赛将定义拉明·亚马尔的世界杯

summary.en: Lamine Yamal may not have had a sparkling World Cup but victory for Spain in Sunday's World Cup final would write a very different narrative.
summary.zh-CN: 拉明·亚马尔（ Lamine Yamal ）可能没有闪闪发光的世界杯，但西班牙在周日世界杯决赛中的胜利将写出一个非常不同的叙述。

title.en: World Cup error will make Lammens stronger - Heaton
title.zh-CN: 世界杯失误将使拉门斯更强大-希顿

summary.en: Tom Heaton is backing Manchester United team-mate Senne Lammens to emerge as a stronger character from his World Cup disappointment.
summary.zh-CN: 汤姆·希顿（ Tom Heaton ）支持曼联队友塞纳·拉门斯（ Senne Lammens ）从世界杯的失望中脱颖而出，成为一个更强大的角色。

title.en: Swansea close in on deal for Motherwell's Just
title.zh-CN: 斯旺西接近Motherwell's Just的交易

summary.en: Swansea City hope to tie up a deal for Motherwell's Elijah Just after he impressed for New Zealand at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 斯旺西市希望在马瑟韦尔的以利亚在世界杯上给新西兰留下深刻印象后，与他达成协议。

title.en: World Cup final: No shots from Argentina in first half with Spain on top LIVE!

title.en: Golden Boot race: Mbappe pulls two clear of Messi
title.zh-CN: 黄金靴比赛：姆巴佩将两人拉离梅西

summary.en: Kylian Mbappe now leads the way in the Golden Boot race with 10 goals - two clear of Lionel Messi who plays in Sunday's World Cup final.
summary.zh-CN: 基利安·姆巴佩（ Kylian Mbappe ）现在以10个进球在金靴赛中领先，其中两个进球与周日世界杯决赛中的莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）相差

title.en: England claim third at World Cup with win in 10-goal thriller over France
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队以10球惊悚片击败法国队夺得世界杯第三名

summary.en: Bukayo Saka’s hat-trick helped England to a remarkable 6-4 bronze medal win over France in Miami to achieve their best World Cup finish since 1966.
